{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Abyssal Palace cultists
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Abyssal Palace cultists]] used an original version of the [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20">''Bloodline'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
